Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Organizuyte vokrug obshchikh problem. Najdite svoikh lyudej. Dejstvuyte vmeste.

Footer.mission: Izmenit' bol'she k luchshemu v nashikh zhiznyakh, chem my smeem predstavit' vozmozhnym.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Izmeneniya ne dolzhny byt' gromkimi, chtoby byt' moshchnymi
Home.description: Najdite drugikh, kotorye delyat vashe mneniya. Dejstvuyte vmeste. Quiet Riots svyazyvaet lyudej vokrug obshchikh frustracij i prevrashchaet zhalby v kollektivnye dejstviya.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Izhite lyubuyu frustaciju — poezda, brokholyudzh, NHS, klimat. Esli ona sushchestvuet, my pokažhem vam, skol'ko drugikh ee delyat.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Posmotrite tu zhe problemu vo vsekh organizacijakh ili vse problemy v odnoj organizacii. Kak tangotancy, menyajushchie napravleniye.
Home.takeActionDesc: Idei, dejstviya i soobshchestvo — personalizirovano dlya vashego vremeni i navykov. Malenkie dejstviya privodjat k bol'shim izmeneniyam.
Home.missionQuote: "Izmenit' bol'she k luchshemu v nashikh zhiznakh, chem my smeem predstavit' vozmozhnym."
Home.basedOn: Osnovan na knige 2014 goda Quiet Riots avtora Sajmona Darlinga

Issues.title: Problemy
Issues.subtitle: {count} problem v {categoryCount} kategorijakh. Najdite svoyu.
Issues.noResults: Problemy ne najdeny. Poprobujte drugoj poisk ili kategoriyu.

IssueDetail.gatherEvidenceDesc: Dokumentiruyte to, chto proiskhodik — transliruyte v priamom efire ili deljites' foto, video i ssylkami.
IssueDetail.riotReelsDesc: Smeshnye i ironichnye video, kotorye peredayut dukh etogo Quiet Riot.
IssueDetail.expertsDesc: Strastnyye volontyory, kotorye idut glubzhe — perevodchiki, specialisty, lidery v smi, yuridicheskie konsiljanty.
IssueDetail.pendingBanner: Etot Quiet Riot proverit'sya — vy mozhete sobrat' dokazatel'stva i podelit'sya svoimi myslami poka on proverit'sya.

Organisations.title: Organisacii
Organisations.subtitle: Prosmotrite organisacii i posmotrite, kakie problemy u lyudej s kazhdoj.
Organisations.noResults: Organisacii ne najdeny dlya etoj kategorii.

OrgDetail.paretoDesc: Neskol'ko problem obychno prichodyat'sya na 80% vsekh zhalob. Topovye problemy nizhe ranzhirovany po chislu postradavshikh lyudej.
OrgDetail.noFeed: Poka net publikatsiy soobshchestva dlya etoy organizatsii.

ActionInitiatives.title: Proekty Dejstviya
ActionInitiatives.subtitle: {count} {count, plural, one {proekt} other {proekta}} kommisioniruyushchikh uslugi dlya kollektivnogo dejstviya.
ActionInitiatives.noResults: Proekty dejstviya ne najdeny. Poprobujte drugoj fil'tr.

ActionInitiativeDetail.wantToSupport: Khozite li vy kommissionirovat' etu uslygu?
ActionInitiativeDetail.topUpFirst: Snachala popolnite vash koshelyok, chtoby nachat'.
ActionInitiativeDetail.createAccountPrompt: Sozdajte akkaunt i zagruzite vash koshelyok, chtoby kommissionirovat' etu uslygu.
ActionInitiativeDetail.completedMessage: Etot proekt byl {status}. Spasibo vsem {count} uchastnikam!

Assistants.title: Assistenty
Assistants.subtitle: {count} par AI agentov i chelovecheskikh organizatorov, pomogayushchikh roitam predprinyat' dejstviya.
Assistants.bannerSubtitle: U kazhdoy kategorii yest spetsialnyy AI-agent i chelovek-organizator dlya pomoshchi.

AssistantDetail.riotsWeHelp: Quiet Riots, s Kotorymi My Pomogaem
AssistantDetail.openRole: Rol' chelovecheskogo organizatora otkryta dlya kazhdogo, kto strasten k etoj kategorii. Vyrazite vash interes nizhe.

Wallet.title: Vash Koshelyok
Wallet.createPromptDesc: Sozdajte besplatnyj akkaunt, chtoby zagruzit' vash koshelyok i kommissionirovat' uslugi dlya proektov dejstviya.

Profile.title: Vash Profil
Profile.findIssues: Najdite problemy, kotoryye vas volnuyut, i prisoedinites' k dvizheniyu.
Profile.noConnectedAccounts: Akkaounty poka ne podklyucheny. Voidite s Google ili Facebook, chtoby svyazat' vash akkaunt.
Profile.cannotUnlinkLast: Ne mozhno otsoedidit' vash yedinstvennyj podklyuchennyj akkaunt
Profile.deactivateConfirm: Vy uvereny, chto khozite deactiviruyte vash akkaunt? Vy mozhete ego reactiviruyte v techenie 30 dnej.
Profile.unlinkPhoneConfirm: Vy uvereny, chto khozite otsoedinit' vash telefonnye nomer? Vy bol'she ne smozhete vojti s nim.
Profile.codeSentToPhone: Kod proverki byl otpravlj v vash WhatsApp.
Profile.cannotUnlinkPhone: Ne mozhno otsoedinit' vash yedinstvennyj metod autentifikacii
Profile.passwordTooShort: Parol' dolzhen byt' ne menee 10 simvolov
Profile.passwordBreached: Etot parol' poyavilsya v narushenii dannyh. Pozhalujsta, vyberi drugi paroli.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Voidite v vash akkaunt Quiet Riots
Auth.joinSubtitle: Organizuyte vokrug obshchikh problem. Deystvuyte vmeste.
Auth.signInLinkSent: My otpravili ssilku dlya vkhoda na vash adres elektronnoy pochty. Shchelknitye na ssilku, chtoby prodolzhit'.
Auth.signUpLinkSent: My otpravili ssilku dlya vkhoda na vash adres elektronnoy pochty. Shchelknitye na ssilku, chtoby sozdat' svoy akkaunt.
Auth.verifyDesc: Ssilka dlya vkhoda byla otpravlena na vash adres elektronnoy pochty. Shchelknitye na ssilku, chtoby prodolzhit'.
Auth.errorAccess: Dostup zapreshchen. U vas mozhet ne byt' dostupa k vkhodu.
Auth.errorVerification: Ssilka dlya vkhoda istekla ili uzhe byla ispol'zovana.
Auth.emailBody: Shchelknitye na knopku nizhche, chtoby vyyti na svoy akkaunt. Eta ssilka istekayot cherez 24 chasa.
Auth.emailIgnore: Yesli vy ne zaprashchivali eto pis'mo, vy mozhete ego spokoyno ignorirovate.
Auth.codeSent: Kod podtverzhdeniya byl otpravlen na vash WhatsApp.
Auth.passwordTooShort: Parol' dolzhen byti' ne menee 10 simvolov
Auth.emailAlreadyExists: Akkaunt s etim emailom uzhe sushchestvuet
Auth.noPasswordSet: Parol' ne ustanovlen. Ispol'zuyte volshebnuyu ssilku ili ustanovite parol' v svoyom profile.
Auth.passwordBreached: Etot parol' poyavlyas' v narushenii dannyh. Pozhaluysta, vyberi te drugoy.
Auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Vvedite vash email i my otpravim vam ssilku dlya sbros a parolya.
Auth.resetEmailSentDesc: Yesli akkaunt sushchestvuet s etim emailom, my otpravili ssilku dlya sbros a parolya. Proverite vash inbox.
Auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Vyberi te novyy parol' dlya vashego akkaunta.
Auth.resetPasswordSuccessDesc: Vash parol' byl sbroshen. Vy mozhete teper' vvesti s novym parol'yu.
Auth.resetEmailSubject: Sbros yte vash parol' Quiet Riots
Auth.resetEmailBody: Shchelknitye na knopku nizhche, chtoby sbrosit' vash parol'. Eta ssilka istekayot cherez 1 chas.
Auth.resetEmailIgnore: Yesli vy ne zaprashchivali sbros parolya, vy mozhete eto pis'mo spokoyno ignorirovate.

GlobalError.title: Chto-to poshlo ne tak
GlobalError.description: Proizoshla neprevidennaya oshibka. Nasha komanda byla uvedomlena.

NotFound.title: Stranitsa ne naydena
NotFound.description: Stranitsa, kotoruyu vy ishchete, ne sushchestvuet ili byla peremeshchena.

Transactions.title: Poslednie Tranzaksii
Transactions.empty: Poka net tranzaksiy. Popolnite svoy koshelek, chtoby nachat'!

Feed.empty: Poka net postov. Budyte pervym, kto podyelitsya!

Actions.noResults: Nikakikh deystviy ne sootvetstvuet vashim fil'tram. Poprobyte rasshirit' vash vybor.

Reels.empty: Poka net reel'ov. Budyte pervym, kto ikh predstavit!
Reels.submitPrompt: Est' smeshnoe video, kotoroe sumiruet etu problemu?
Reels.submitSuccess: Spasibo! Vash reel' byl predstavlen na proverku.

TopUp.simulated: Simulirovannoe popolnenie dlya testirovanya. Real'nye platezhi skoro.
TopUp.failed: Popolnenie ne udalos. Pozhaluysta, poprobuyte eshchyo raz.

Pay.failed: Platyozh ne udalsa. Pozhaluysta, poprobuyte eshchyo raz.

Claim.success: Spasibo! My zametili vashe interés k rolyam {name}. My svyazhemsya s vami.

Evidence.photoFormats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF. Maksimum 4 MB kazhdyy.
Evidence.empty: Dokazatel'stva yeshchyo ne sobrany. Bud'te pervym, kto zadokumentiruyet proiskhodjashcheye.

ProfileEdit.title: Redaktirovat' profil'
ProfileEdit.skillsHint: Chrez zapyatayu. Pomogaet podognat' vas s relevantnym deystviyami.

CookieConsent.title: Parametry kukov
CookieConsent.description: My ispol'zuem kuki, chtoby derzhat' vas vvodenym i uluchshat' vashe opyt. Analiticheskiye kuki pomogayut nam ponyat', kak ispolzuetsya sayt.
CookieConsent.essentialDescription: Neobkhodimo dlya raboty sayta. Nelzya otklyuchit'.
CookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Pomogite nam ponyat', kak vy ispolzuyete sayt, chtoby my mogli ego uluchshit'.

Onboarding.interestsSubtitle: Vyberi kategorii, kotorye vam vazhn. My pokazhem vam relevantnyye voprosy i deystviya.
Onboarding.interestsSelected: {count, plural, =0 {Kategorii ne vybrany} one {1 kategoriya vyrana} other {# kategoriy vyrano}}
Onboarding.languageSubtitle: My obnaruzhili yazyk vashego brauzera. Vy mozhete ego izmenit' zdes'.
Onboarding.countrySubtitle: Eto pomogaet nam pokazat' vam mestnye voprosy i ustanovit' vashu valyutu.
Onboarding.countrySkip: Spisok stran nedostupn. Vy mozhete eto ustanovit' pozhe v svoëm profile.

SuggestPage.title: Predlozhit' Novogo Quiet Riot
SuggestPage.subtitle: Ne mozhete najt' vash vopros? Predlozhite novogo Quiet Riot i my ego proverim.

SuggestForm.namePlaceholder: napr. Stoimost' Mobil'nykh Dannyh, Krizis Vyboyin...
SuggestForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Rasskazhite nam bol'she ob etom voprose...
SuggestForm.publicRecognition: Pokazi menya kak Pervogo Quiet Rioter (snyat' galochku, chtoby ostat'sya anonimnym)
SuggestForm.successMessage: Vash Quiet Riot teper' v komnatye ozhidaniya. Setup Guide proverit ego v techenie chasa. Vy mozhete sobrat' dokazatel'stva i podelit'sya svoimi myslyami, poka on proveryayetsya.

RejectionReasons.title: Pochemu Quiet Riots Otklonyayutsya
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Ponimanie protsessa proverki
RejectionReasons.intro: Kazhdoe predlozheniye dlya novogo Quiet Riot proveryayetsya Setup Guide, chtoby ubeditsya, chto ono sootvetstvuet platforme i mozhet sdelat' real'nyy effekt. Vot prichiny, po kotorym predlozheniye mozhet ne byt' odobryno:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: Yesli vashe predlozheniye ochen' pokhozhe na Quiet Riot, kotoryy uzhe sushchestvuet, my ob'yedinyom vashe predlozheniye s sushchestvuyushchim. Eto derzhat' soobshchestvo skontsentrirovannym i predotvrashchaet fragmentatsiyu. Chem bol'she lyudey pozadi odnogo Quiet Riot, tem bol'shiy vliyanie.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: Kogda eto sluchayetsya, vy budete avtomaticheski dobavleny k sushchestvuyushchemu Quiet Riot, chtoby vy mogli srazhu nachat' predprinymat' deystviya.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots - eto ob obshchikh voprosakh, ne ob orientatsii na otdel'nykh lits. My fokusiruemsya na sistemnyye problemy — takie kak plokhaya shirokopolosnaya svyaz', vozrastayushchie energobudzhety ili neadekvatnoye zdravookhraneniye — a ne na lichnyye zhaloby na konkretnyh lyudey.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: Yesli vy rasstroeny konkretnym chelovekom ili obshchestvennym deyatelem, poprobuyte perefrazirovat eto kak osnovnuyu problemu. Naprimer, vmesto napravleniya na GENDIREKTURA, predlozhite Quiet Riot o praktikakh kompanii.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: My ne mozhem razmieshchat' Quiet Riots, kotorye populyariziruyut ili organizuyut nezakonnuyu deyatel'nost'. Eto vklyuchaet vsyo, chto narushayet primenimye zakony, promotiruet nasiliye ili mozhet postavit' lyudey v risk.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Vremya ot vremeni predlozheniye mozhet ne sootvestvovať po drugoy prichine — vozmozhno, ono slizhkom rasplyavchato, ili Setup Guide nuzhna bol'she informatsii. V etih sluchayakh vy poluchite soobshcheniye, ob'yasnyayushchee prichinu i to, chto vy mozhete sdelat' dalee.
RejectionReasons.whatNextIntro: Yesli vashe predlozheniye otklaneno, vy vsegda mozhete:
RejectionReasons.reframe: Perefrazirovať i poprobovať snova — izmenit' nazvanie ili opisaniye, chtoby luchshe sootvestvovať rukovodstvam
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Prisoedinytsya k sushchestvuyushchemu Quiet Riot — vash vopros mozhet uzhe byt' oharakterizovan
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Otvětit' Setup Guide — esli vy schitayete, chto otkaz byl oshibkoy, otpravte soobshcheniye, ob'yasnyayushchee vashu pozitsiyu

AnonymousInfo.title: Anonimnyye Pervyye Riotery
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: Chto oznachayet byt' anonimnym
AnonymousInfo.intro: Kogda kto-to nachinayet novogo Quiet Riot, oni stanovyatsya Pervym Quiet Rioter. Eto badge chesti — chelovek, kotoryy imel muzhestvo skazat' pervym.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Ne kazhdyy khochet, chtoby ikh imya bylo publichno prikrepleno k voprosu. Eto absolyutno normalno. Kogda Pervyy Quiet Rioter vybiraet ostat'sya anonimnym:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: Ikh imya i foto profilya skryvayutsya so stranitsy voprosa
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Vmesto etogo pokazyvaetsya anonimnyy badge, chtoby lyudi znali, chto kto-to eto nachal, bez znaniya kto
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Setup Guides yeshche znayut, kto eto nachal (dlya tseley moderatsii)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: Pervyy Rioter mozhet peremenyat' svoe mnenie pozhe i vybrat' byt' publichno priznan
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: Yest' mnogo valid prichin, chtoby ostat'sya anonimnym:
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: Vy rabotayete dlya kompanii, svyazannoy s voprosam
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: Vy predpocitayete, chtoby prichina govorila sama za sebya
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: Yesli vy nachali Quiet Riot anonimno, no pozhe reshili, chto khotite byt' priznan, vy mozhete obnovit' svoyu predpochtenie v lyuboy moment cherez vashy vkhod ili otpraviv soobshcheniye Setup Guide.

Setup.title: Rukovodstvo po nastrojke
Setup.subtitle: Proverite i upravlyajte predlozheniyami Quiet Riot
Setup.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {1 predlozhenie} other {# predlozhenij}} ozhidaet proverki
Setup.approveAndGoLive: Odobrit' perevody i pojti v efir
Setup.translationsBeingGenerated: Perevody generiruyutsya avtomaticheski — obnovite stranitsu primerno cherez 30 sekund.
Setup.translationSlower: Perevod zanyal bolshe vremeni, chem ozhidalos. Poprobuyte snova ili obnovite cherez minutu.
Setup.imageGenerationFailed: Ne Udalos Sozdat Izobrazhenie — Poprobuite Pozhe

Admin.title: Administrirovaniye
Admin.subtitle: Upravlyaniye pol'zovatelyami i rolyami
Admin.searchPlaceholder: Poischi po imeni, e-majlu ili telefonu...
Admin.noRoleHolders: Nikakijm pol'zovatelyam eshche ne naznacheny roli.

FirstRioterInfo.title: Pervyj Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: CHto znachit nachat' Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Kazhdyj Quiet Riot nachinayetsya s odnoj cheloveka — Pervogo Quiet Riotera. Eto tot, kto imeet muzhestvo vyrazit' svoye mnenie po probleme i nachat' dvizheniye za izmeneniya.
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: Byt' pervym, kto podnymaet problemu, prinosit spetsialnoe priznaniye:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: Postoyannyj znachok Pervogo Quiet Riotera na stranice problemy
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: Vybor mezhdu publichnnym priznaniyem ili anonimnost'yu
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: Avtomaticheskoe chlenstvo kak pervyj chelovek, prisoedinyvsshijsya k Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Obnovleniya, kogda vashe predlozhenie proverenno, odobrenno ili vypushheno v zhizn'
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: Byt' Pervym Rioterom — eto znachok chesti, a ne obremeneniye. Strogo neobhodimyh trebovanij net, no my pooshhryaem Pervyh Rioterov:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Podderzhat' problemu, delyas' eyu s drugimi, kotorym ona vazhna
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityEvidence: Delit'sya dokazatel'stvami i istoriyami, kotoryje illustriruyut problemu
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: Privetstvovat' novyh chlenov, prisoedinyayushchihsya k Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: Kogda vy predlagayete novyj Quiet Riot, vy vybiraye, kak vy khotite byt' priznannym:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: Publichnoe — vashe imya i profil' poyavlyayutsya na stranice problemy kak Pervyj Riot
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Anonimno — vmesto etogo pokazyvaetsya anonimnyj znachok, zaschishhayushhij vashu identichnost'
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: Vy mozzhete izmenit' vashy predpochteniya v lyuboj moment cherez vashu vhodno poslutu ili obratyvshis' k Rukovodstvu po nastrojke
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Prosto predlozhite novyj Quiet Riot cherez veb-sajt ili bota WhatsApp. Esli vashe predlozhenie odobrenno rukovoditelyami po nastrojke, vy stanovites' Pervym Quiet Rioterom dlya etoj problemy.
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: Vashe predlozhenie prohodit protsess proverki, gde rukovoditelim po nastrojke proverit', chto ono sootvetstvuet rukovodstvam. Oni mogut poprosit' bol'she informacii, predlozhit' ob'edineniye s sushestvuyushchej problemoj ili odobrit' yeyo vypusk v zhizn'.

Share.title: Vasha Quiet Riots Share
Share.profileLink: Uznayte bol'she o vashey Quiet Riots share →
Share.heroSubtitle: Kazhdyy Quiet Rioter po vsemu miru poluchayet odnu share v Quiet Riots — v samu kompaniyu.
Share.ownershipDesc: Kak aktsionernyy, vy vladeyete real'noy chast'yu Quiet Riots. Eto ne token, ne badge i ne metafora — eto nastoyashchaya share v UK limited kompanii, zaregistrirovannoy v Companies House.
Share.ownershipPoint1: Vy stanovites' yuridicheskim sovladeltsem Quiet Riots
Share.ownershipPoint2: Vasha share rastet v tsennosti, po mere rosta kompanii
Share.ownershipPoint3: Vy mozhete poluchit' dividendy, yesli kompaniya raspredelyayet pribyl'
Share.ownershipPoint4: U vas yest' aktsionernye prava v sootvetstvii s zakonom UK o kompaniyakh
Share.considerationDesc: V sootvetstvii s zakonom UK (Companies Act 2006), share ne mogut byt' vydany besplatno. Nominal'naya oplata — zvannaya consideration — trebuetsya dlya yuriditieskoy dostovernosti share.
Share.considerationAmount: Consideration dlya vashey share — 10 pensov (ili ekvivalent v vashey mestnoy valyute).
Share.considerationWallet: Eto vychitatsia iz vashego Quiet Riots koshelka, kogda vy prodolzhite.
Share.considerationRefund: Yesli vasha zayavka budet otklonena, 10p avtomaticheski vozvrashchaetsya v vash koshelok.
Share.growthSharesTitle: Kak eto rabotayet pri razlichnykh otsenkakh
Share.growthSharesDesc: Vasha share ispol'zuyet strukturu growth share — spetsial'nyy klass, kotoromustanavlivayetsya tsennost' tol'ko vyshe opredelennoy otseki kompanii. Eto oznachayet minimal'niy nalog v moment vydachi.
Share.preSeedDesc: Share vydany po nominal'noy stoimosti. Vy platite 10p. Nikakogo znachitel'nogo nalogovogo sobytiya.
Share.seedDesc: Ta zhe nominal'naya stoimost'. Growth share barrier zafiksirovana vyshe tekushchey otsenki.
Share.seriesADesc: Prava pre-empsii otmenyayutsya dlya pol'zovatel'skogo share pool. Barrier minimiziruet tekushchuyu stoimost'.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share barrier obespechivayet ogranichennuyu tekushchuyu stoimost' nesmotrya na vysokuyu otsenku kompanii.
Share.seriesCDesc: Pol'zovatel'skiy share pool — eto opredelenniy protsent cap table. Nikakikh novykh razvodivaushchikh vydan.
Share.ipoDesc: Pol'zovatel'skiye share preobrazuyutsya v obychnye torguyemye share. Pri prodazhe mozhet primenyat'sya nalog na kapitalnye pribyli.
Share.responsibility1: Nalogovye objazannosti zavyat ot vashey strany prozhivaniya — konsul'tiruytes' s kvalifitsirovannym konsul'tantom
Share.responsibility2: Nyet garantii, chto kompaniya dostignet kakvyyu-libo otsenku
Share.responsibility3: Struktura share mozhet byt' izmenenea, po mere rosta kompanii
Share.responsibility4: Eto ne yuridicheskiy, nalogovyy ili investitsionnyy sovet
Share.disclaimer1: Eto uproshchennoe ob'yasneniye — ne yuridicheskiy, nalogovyy ili investitsionnyy sovet.
Share.disclaimer2: Nalogovye objazannosti kazhdogo pol'zovatealya zavyat ot ikh strany prozhivaniya.
Share.disclaimer3: Nyet garantii, chto kompaniya dostignet kakvyyu-libo otsenku.
Share.disclaimer4: Struktura share mozhet byt' izmenenea, po mere rosta kompanii.
Share.disclaimer5: Pol'zovateli dolzhny konsul'tirovatsya s kvalifitsirovannymi konsul'tantami v svoey strane.
Share.eligibilityDesc: Chtoby kvalifitsirovatsya dlya predlozheniya share, vam nuzhno:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Byt' proverennym pol'zovatelem (imya i email ili telefon podtverzhdeny)
Share.proceedDesc: Gotovy stat' aktsionerom? 10p consideration budet vychitana iz vashego koshelka.
Share.proceedConfirm: Nominal'naya oplata 10p budet vychitana iz vashego koshelka. Eto yuridicheskoye trebovaniye dlya validnosti share.
Share.proceedSuccess: Vasha zayavka otpravlena! Share Guide rassmotrit yeye v blizhayshee vremya.
Share.insufficientFunds: Vam nuzhno po krainoy mere 10p v koshelke dlya prodolzheniya.
Share.declineDesc: Yesli vy ne khotite share, vy mozhete permanent'no otklonit' predlozheniye. Platezh ne budet vypolnen.
Share.declineConfirm: Vy uvereny? Eto permanent'no i ne mozhet byt' otmeneno. Vam nikogda ne budet predlozhena share.
Share.withdrawDesc: Otmenit' vashu zayavku i poluchit' polnyy vozvrat 10p.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Vy uvereny? Vam budet vozvrashchen 10p v koshelok.
Share.withdrawSuccess: Vasha zayavka otzvana. 10p vozvrashchen v vash koshelok.
Share.reapplyDesc: Vasha predydushchaya zayavka byla otklonena. Vy mozhete peredat' zayavku s novoy 10p oplatoy.
Share.passwordDesc: Razdel share zashchishchen parolem dlya vashey bezopasnosti.
Share.identityDesc: Chtoby zavershit' vashu zayavku na share, nam nuzhno verifikovat' vashu identichnost'. Eta informatsiya zaifrirovana i khranitsya bezopasno.
Share.identityMustBe18: Vy dolzhny byt' po krainoy mere 18 let.
Share.issueRequestReceived: Vasha zayavka poluchena. My svyazhemsya s vami v blizhayshee vremya.

BotMessages.noMoreReels: Bol'she net neprosmotrennyh rolikov dlya etoy problemy
BotMessages.youAreLive: Vy v efire! Bud'te strastnymi, no uvazhitel'nymi.
BotMessages.responseSentToGuide: Vash otvet otpravlen v Setup Guide.
BotMessages.verificationEmailSent: Pis'mo s podtverzhdeniem otpravleno na {email}. Poprosyite pol'zovatelya proverit' pochtovyy yashchik i nazhat' na ssylku.
BotMessages.verifyEmailPlaceholder: U pol'zovatelya yest' zammeshchayushchiy email WhatsApp. Ispol'zuyte link_email, chtoby ustanovit' real'nyy email.
BotMessages.shareNeedMore: Vam nuzhno yeshcho {riots} Quiet Riots i {actions} deystviy dlya kvalifikatsii.
BotMessages.shareEligible: Vy imeete pravo na aktsiyu Quiet Riots! Posetite svoy profil' ili skazhite "apply for share", chtoby prodolzhit'.
BotMessages.shareApplicationStatus: Vasha zayavka na aktsiyu imeyet status {status}.
BotMessages.shareQualified: Vy kvalifitsirovany dlya polucheniya aktsii Quiet Riots!
BotMessages.shareProgress: Progress: prisoyedinilis' k {riotsJoined}/3 Quiet Riots, vypolneno {actionsTaken}/10 deystviy{verificationNote}.
BotMessages.shareNotEligible: Vy yeshcho ne imeete prava na aktsiyu. Prisoyedinyaytes' k bol'shemu kolichestvu Quiet Riots i vypolnyayte bol'she deystviy.
BotMessages.shareCannotApplyStatus: Nevozmozhno podat' zayavku — vash tekushchiy status {status}.
BotMessages.shareInsufficientBalance: Nedostatochno sredstv v koshelke. Vam nuzhno minimum 10p (u vas {balance}p). Snachala popolnite koshelyok.
BotMessages.shareApplied: 10p vychsteno iz vashego koshelka. Vasha zayavka na aktsiyu teper' na rassmotrenii. Share Guide skoro yeyo proverit.
BotMessages.shareDeclined: Vy navsegda otklonili predlozhenie aktsii. Platyozh ne byl vzat. Eto reshenie nel'zya otmenit'.
BotMessages.shareCannotDecline: Nevozmozhno otklonit' — libo u vas net podhodyashchego predlozheniya aktsii, libo vasha zayavka uzhe v protsesse.
BotMessages.shareWithdrawn: Vasha zayavka na aktsiyu otozvana, i vashi 10p vozvrashcheny v koshelyok.
BotMessages.shareCannotWithdraw: Nevozmozhno otzozvat' — vasha zayavka mozhet byt' ne v sostoyanii, dopuskayushchem otzyv.
BotMessages.shareReapplied: 10p vychsteno iz vashego koshelka. Vasha povtornaya zayavka na aktsiyu teper' na rassmotrenii.
BotMessages.shareCannotReapply: Nevozmozhno podat' povtorno — vasha zayavka mozhet byt' ne v otklyonennnom sostoyanii.
BotMessages.shareNoApplication: U vas yeshcho net zayavki na aktsiyu.
BotMessages.shareQuestionSent: Vash vopros otpravlen komande Share Guide. Vy poluchite otvet v svoyom pochtovom yashchike.
BotMessages.suggestionApproved: Khoroshie novosti — tvoy Quiet Riot "{name}" odobren! My soobshchim tebe, kogda on stanet aktivnym.
BotMessages.suggestionRejected: Tvoyo predlozhenie "{name}" ne poluchilo 👍, potomu chto {reason}.
BotMessages.suggestionRejectedWithLink: Tvoyo predlozhenie "{name}" ne poluchilo 👍, potomu chto {reason}. Uznat bolshe: https://www.quietriots.com/info/rejection-reasons
BotMessages.suggestionMerged: Tvoyo predlozhenie "{name}" pokhozhe na sushchestvuyushchiy Quiet Riot. My dobavili tebya — posmotri: {link}
BotMessages.suggestionGoLive: Tvoy Quiet Riot "{name}" teper aktiven! Podelis im s druzyami, kotorym vazhna eta tema.
BotMessages.rejectionCloseToExisting: slishkom pokhozhe na sushchestvuyushchiy Quiet Riot
BotMessages.rejectionAboutPeople: napravleno na lyudey, a ne na problemy
BotMessages.alreadyFollowing: Vy uže sledite za etim Quiet Riot.
BotMessages.maxFollowsBot: Vy možete sledit' do 100 Quiet Riots.

Chicken.title: Razvyornut' Kuricu
Chicken.subtitle: Otprav'te cheloveka v kostyume curice, chtoby dostavit' vashE rukopisnoE pis'mo protesta lyubomu general'nomu direktoru, politiku ili izvestnomu licu.
Chicken.step1Desc: Skazhite nam, kto dolzhen poluchit' vashe pis'mo i gde ego naiti.
Chicken.step2Desc: Napishite pis'mo (do 500 simvolov), kotoroe nasha curica dostavit' lichno.
Chicken.step3Desc: Nastoyashchiy chelovek v kostyume curice dostavlyaet vashe pis'mo s fotografiyey v kachestve podtverzhdeniya.
Chicken.noDeployments: Nikakih razvyortyvaniy curic poka net. Razvyornite vashu pervuyu curicu!
Chicken.loginPrompt: Vam nuzhen akkaunt, chtoby otpravit' razvyortyvaniye curice.

ChickenDeploy.title: Razvyornut' Kuricu
ChickenDeploy.deployFailed: Razvyortyvaniye ne udalos'. Pozhaluysta, poprobuyite yeshche raz.
ChickenDeploy.networkError: Oshibka seti. Pozhaluysta, proverite vashe soyedineniye.
